stem.pure sciences: gives a strong base for medicine, engineering, and science degrees
stem.applied sciences: works well for applied science, agriculture, and health-related pathways
stem.technical & engineering: fits technical, engineering, and technology-focused pathways
stem.career & technical studies (cts): supports practical technical and career-oriented pathways
stem.default: gives a strong foundation for science and technical careers

social sciences.languages & literature: supports communication, law, media, and language-focused careers
social sciences.humanities & business studies: builds a strong base for business, law, public service, and social science careers
social sciences.default: builds a strong foundation for communication, society, and people-focused careers

arts & sports.arts: supports creative expression, performing arts, and media pathways
arts & sports.sports & recreation: supports sports performance, coaching, and recreation pathways
arts & sports.default: supports creative expression and performance-based career pathways
